title: Piquant Vietnamese Almonds Mi Quang
description: A festive Vietnamese dish featuring flaked almonds and lacquer glaze, this fatty and gooey mi quang is perfect for special occasions, and is also fodmap friendly.
instructions: Cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the sliced pork sausage to the skillet and cook until browned.
Add the flaked almonds to the skillet and cook until toasted.
In a small bowl, whisk together the lacquer glaze, fish sauce, lime juice, salt, and black pepper.
Pour the glaze mixture over the pork and almonds in the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the glaze and pork mixture.
Transfer the mi quang to a serving platter and garnish with chopped scallions.
